summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Community Discussion Platform (CDP) - both backend APIs and frontend UI are working excellently

minor_issues.issue: Returns 400 when user already member instead of 200 with appropriate message
minor_issues.impact: Expected behavior, not a bug - proper validation

minor_issues.issue: Returns 200 for vote updates instead of 201

passed_tests: JWT token authentication and session management
All CRUD operations for groups (create, read, join, leave)
All CRUD operations for posts (create, read, filter by group)
Frontend login page with proper styling and validation
Navigation between Feed, Groups, and Group Detail pages
Create Post form with group selection and validation
Post creation and real-time display in feed
Responsive UI with excellent dark theme design
All interactive elements are clickable and functional
